creator: h.eichmann@gmx.de
text:
Upgrade to 1.70.1

Fix: see attached diff

Heiner

--Boundary-00=_3mUvEVVMn1Gv4XH
Content-Type: text/x-diff;
  charset="iso-8859-1";
  name="krusader.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment;
	filename="krusader.diff"



--Boundary-00=_3mUvEVVMn1Gv4XH----ZIEBKdXZQSddXwYIlaqGoPJCALopXGlrRKaIXGJUeBTwUjuz
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -urN ../../x11-fm/krusader/Makefile ./Makefile
--- ../../x11-fm/krusader/Makefile	Mon Apr  3 20:44:21 2006
+++ ./Makefile	Tue Jul 18 21:46:18 2006
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	krusader
-PORTVERSION=	1.70.0
+PORTVERSION=	1.70.1
 CATEGORIES=	x11-fm kde
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=krusader
diff -urN ../../x11-fm/krusader/distinfo ./distinfo
--- ../../x11-fm/krusader/distinfo	Mon Apr  3 20:44:21 2006
+++ ./distinfo	Tue Jul 18 21:45:19 2006
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (krusader-1.70.0.tar.gz) = 3c2d73637c72e1042fef52ad1a336a64
-SHA256 (krusader-1.70.0.tar.gz) = 511f73f583c641cc102cc9f79e1e7ec42f7a67e91db68eeada5240de20ce71cc
-SIZE (krusader-1.70.0.tar.gz) = 4065460
+MD5 (krusader-1.70.1.tar.gz) = d8b33c94385fe055d55f592f0dc15c36
+SHA256 (krusader-1.70.1.tar.gz) = 32a11980e0e7ac77b5435caf8aba5aa73e7fe2d8531d2db375b92913ef8dd5f2
+SIZE (krusader-1.70.1.tar.gz) = 4144314
diff -urN ../../x11-fm/krusader/pkg-plist ./pkg-plist
--- ../../x11-fm/krusader/pkg-plist	Mon Apr  3 20:44:22 2006
+++ ./pkg-plist	Tue Jul 18 22:30:46 2006
@@ -185,6 +185,7 @@
 share/locale/sr/LC_MESSAGES/krusader.mo
 share/locale/sr@Latn/LC_MESSAGES/krusader.mo
 share/locale/sv/LC_MESSAGES/krusader.mo
+share/locale/tr/LC_MESSAGES/krusader.mo
 share/locale/uk/LC_MESSAGES/krusader.mo
 share/locale/zh_CN/LC_MESSAGES/krusader.mo
 share/services/iso.protocol
